testimonials.title: Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Our Members Love Us
testimonials.text1: FitMaker completely transformed my fitness journey. The personalized coaching and structured programs made all the difference!
testimonials.text2: I lost 20kg in 3 months with the Beginner Plan. The community support and nutrition guidance were invaluable.
testimonials.text3: Best investment for my fitness. The Custom Plan gave me everything I needed to achieve my bodybuilding goals.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about FitMaker
faq.a1: FitMaker is a comprehensive fitness platform offering personalized coaching, training programs, nutrition guidance, and a supportive community to help you achieve your fitness goals.
faq.a2: Simply create an account by signing up on our platform. Choose a plan that fits your needs and start your fitness journey with personalized workouts.
faq.q3: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a3: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime without any penalties. Your membership will continue until the end of your billing cycle.
faq.a4: Absolutely! Our Pro and Custom plans include personalized coaching sessions with certified fitness professionals.
faq.q5: What if I'm a complete beginner?
faq.a5: Our Beginner Plan is perfect for you! It includes easy-to-follow workout programs, basic nutrition guidelines, and access to our community support.
faq.a6: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with our platform and services.
